programmes.show_description: Louis Theroux travels to Johannesburg, where crime-plagued residents - despairing of the police - have turned to an industry of private security offering protection at a price.

Gylly, Albert & Barney: A Pug and Beagle cross is hit by a bus, crushing an ankle and causing extensive damage to his leg, while a Labrador puppy has developed lameness.

programmes.show_name: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Lagos
programmes.show_description: Louis Theroux investigates the law and order of Lagos, spending time with both the so-called Area Boys gang members and the government's own paramilitary task force.

programmes.show_name: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
programmes.show_description: Beyond Belief: Louis looks back at his earliest documentaries and explores how some people's most fervent beliefs can bring them into conflict with mainstream society.
